pages.text: The $(item)Bastion Remnant Skyseed$() — blackstone, gold and crying obsidian. A blackstone bastion ruin with a $(item)lodestone$() treasure plinth, bastion loot and a $(bold)magma cube spawner$(); piglins included.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Blackstone off a Nether-thrown $(item)Rocky$() isle, gold from a $(item)Badlands$() (or nether gold ore), crying obsidian from a $(item)Ruined Portal$().
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

A piece of a $(bold)bastion remnant$() set adrift — one of three: a $(bold)bridge$() over a lava channel, a walled $(bold)housing$() block, or a $(bold)treasure$() room with a $(item)lodestone$() plinth and a caged $(item)magma cube$() spawner. Blackstone, gold and $(item)gilded blackstone$(), with bastion loot. Piglins, a brute and hoglins hold it; barter your way past in gold.
Nether-native — it fizzles thrown anywhere else, and (like the real thing) $(bold)never takes in the basalt deltas$(). Crafted from blackstone, gold and $(item)crying obsidian$().
